# CWE-454 negative: MFA policy from server environment only (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-454-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

var enforceMFA bool

func RegisterBootstrap(db *sql.DB) {
	enforceMFA = os.Getenv("ENFORCE_MFA") == "true"
	http.HandleFunc("/health", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]bool{"mfa": enforceMFA})
	})
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE settings SET mfa = ?", enforceMFA)
}
